ClientSideComponent.Name: KIHub Prompt Cards
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"9c84e88f-bdf6-4b8f-9c30-2a8fe174a111","alias":"KIHubPromptCardsWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"1.0.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart"],"supportsThemeVariants":true,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"cf066440-0614-43d6-98ae-0b31cf14c7c3","group":{"default":"Other"},"title":{"default":"KIHub Prompt Cards"},"description":{"default":"Displays prompt cards from the Copilot Prompt Library."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"BulletedListText","properties":{"listName":"Copilot Prompt Library","copilotUrl":"https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat","filterType":"None","filterValue":""}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"ki-hub-prompt-cards-web-part","scriptResources":{"ki-hub-prompt-cards-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"ki-hub-prompt-cards-web-part_c26f67ba3ce4ac7fdaa7.js"},"@microsoft/sp-core-library":{"type":"component","id":"7263c7d0-1d6a-45ec-8d85-d4d1d234171b","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-http":{"type":"component","id":"c07208f0-ea3b-4c1a-9965-ac1b825211a6","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.22.2"}}}}
